title: 12 x 3.5 Hour Chafing Dish Fuel Gel Cans (12 Tins pack)
features: Suitable for indoor use (smoke and odour free)

Ethanol fuel is a renewable and environmentally friendly option for chafing dishes. It is derived from plant-based sources and is 100% recyclable. Ethanol fuel burns cleanly, producing minimal smoke and odor. It is a safe and non-toxic choice for foodservice establishments.
